body:
sapphic-dice:

Magical girls should kiss each other.

Born of want and pain.

Of who they could never be.

They slowly dismantle the lives of their waking selves.

Letting identities and relationships that hurt them… fall away.

Until the boys they once were fade apart.

Like a dream.

And all that’s left are soft lips of warm sunsets, eyes of pooling mist, and skin of shining opal.

As the town sinks into oblivion and ecstasy.

And all… is undone.
